fields.label: Contract #
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sContractNumber FROM tblContract ORDER BY dtDateEffective DESC

fields.label: Client / Contract Name
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sContractName1 FROM tblContract ORDER BY dtDateEffective DESC
fields.notes: sContractName1 is the client/contract name stored directly on tblContract

fields.label: Start Date
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 CONVERT(VARCHAR, dtDateEffective, 101) AS StartDate FROM tblContract ORDER BY dtDateEffective DESC

fields.label: End Date
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 CONVERT(VARCHAR, dtDateTermination, 101) AS EndDate FROM tblContract ORDER BY dtDateEffective DESC

fields.label: Annual Contract Value
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(dblAmtTotal, 0) AS ACV FROM tblContract ORDER BY dtDateEffective DESC

fields.label: Status
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 CASE WHEN dtDateTermination < GETDATE() THEN 'Expired' WHEN dtDateTermination BETWEEN GETDATE() AND DATEADD(day,90,GETDATE()) THEN 'Expiring' ELSE 'Active' END AS Status FROM tblContract ORDER BY dtDateEffective DESC
